persons.arguments_against: Place evidence is inherited across clauses (weak on its own). But initials H.N.D. are exact, the colony is Mauritius, the office (Receiver-General, with acting Colonial Secretary) matches the entry, and the C.M.G. is shared. Four independent dimensions agree.
persons.would_overturn: A second same-surname person serving the same colony in the same years and offices, or a printed birth/death date excluding these years.

notes: production high-value slice, hand-adjudicated (Claude Code, in-session)
